metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1910
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 1. Lck protein tyrosine kinase is enriched in the PSD fraction.

Literal:
"The subcellular distribution of Src has been previously determined (Huang et al., 2001) and thus Src was used as a positive control in these experiments. The pattern of relative abundance of Lck and Lyn in the various subcellular fractions, as compared with the starting homogenate (H), was similar to that of Src (Fig. 1A). In contrast, the pattern of relative abundance of Yes was distinct from that of Src (Fig. 1A) but similar to that of Fyn (not illustrated).". Experimental description: Rat brains are used for the biochemical fractionation experiments.

Literal from M&M:
"2.1. Tissue preparation
Subcellular fractionation was performed using methods modified from Huttner et al. (1983) and Lin et al. (1998). Briefly, adult male rat forebrain Dounce homogenate (H) was centrifuged at 1000g to remove nuclei and other large debris (pelleted in P1)."
